Industries

Solutions for every sector

From a single residential tower to a sprawling industrial estate — engineered to your context, capacity and compliance.

Sectors

Where our engineering works

Residential Buildings

Compact STPs and grey-water reuse for apartments, villas and townships.

Government Projects

Municipal STPs, river rejuvenation and smart-city water infrastructure.

Private Industries

Effluent treatment, recovery and zero liquid discharge solutions.

Hotels & Resorts

Discreet, high-reliability systems with reuse for landscaping.

Hospitals

ETPs designed for medical waste streams with strict compliance.

Commercial / Hospitality

IT parks, malls and mixed-use developments.

Educational Institutes

Campus-wide STP and harvesting systems.

Smart Cities

IoT-enabled water grids, monitoring and analytics.

Housing Societies

Retrofit and AMC for existing society STPs.

KHM Infra Innovations delivers advanced water and wastewater treatment systems for residential, industrial and government infrastructure.
